element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core gameplay loop - maintaining production chains
Allocation and optimization of labor force
Unlocks advanced production and military capabilities
Defense against opponents and conquest objectives

typical_tension_triggers: Resource scarcity or supply chain disruption
Population dissatisfaction from low standard of living
Competing economic demands with limited resources
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Real-time pacing with micromanagement emphasis; tension emerges from economic management failures rather than immediate action pressure

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to settlement building and basic resource management with minimal opposition
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing complexity of production chains; introduction of military threats and competing objectives
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex multi-chain economic optimization; significant military opposition; predetermined objectives become challenging
notable_spikes: Introduction of complex production chain requirements
Late-game objective completion under time or resource pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Open-ended scenarios focused on establishing and maintaining complex supply-demand economic chains without strict time limits
Predetermined goals requiring military strength, economic robustness, and strategic planning to defeat opponents
Limited map resources force strategic planning and optimization of production chains
